prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约4763→4456→5848→7751→8354，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约3898名；2025年基准约8354名；本省理科（物理类）计划2021年29人、2022年29人、2023年28人、2024年29人、2025年30人；2026年计划32人，较2025年扩招约6.7%，扩招将导致竞争略有缓解，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第57名，近年排名稳定在50名左右，属于中上层次财经类院校；该校在声誉文件中无专门负面或正面记录；抖音热度总排名第91位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等；未见投档断档或异常信号，整体报考心理平稳；应用经济学A、工商管理A、外国语言文学A-，均为该校核心优势学科，对应金融学类、工商管理类、外国语言文学类等招生专业，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2024年为"分化观望"，较2021年明显降温；计算机类持续高热推荐；本省2026年考生总数约47.49万，较2025年47.25万略有增加，估算物理类考生约26.78万（+0.53%），竞争略加剧；该校位于北京，非本省院校；江西省招生占比约3.3%（2025年），无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划扩招约6.7%以及本省考生小幅增加；考虑扩招缓解竞争但考生增加、财经类专业热度分化观望，预计位次；预测最低位次约8658名，区间8158–9158名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 4763 → 4456 → 5848 → 7751 → 8354, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3898 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 8354 places; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 29 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, an expansion of about 6.7% compared to 2025, which will slightly ease competition and cause the ranking number to tend to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings around 50th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of finance and economics institutions; there are no specific negative or positive records in the reputation file; Douyin heat ranks 91st overall, rated as 'average', with medium short video exposure; no signs of application gaps or anomalies, overall application psychology is stable; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, all core advantageous disciplines of the university, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Finance, Business Administration, and Foreign Language and Literature, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/economics/economic majors in 2024 is 'differentiated and wait-and-see', significantly cooling compared to 2021; computer majors continue to be highly recommended; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 474,900, a slight increase from 472,500 in 2025, with an estimated physics category examinees of about 267,800 (+0.53%), slightly intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, not a provincial institution; the enrollment proportion in Jiangxi is about 3.3% (2025), with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.7%, and the slight increase in provincial examinees; considering that expansion eases competition but examinees increase and finance/economics major popularity is differentiated and wait-and-see, the ranking is expected; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8658, with a range of 8158–9158.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of finance and economics institutions. There are no specific negative or positive records in the reputation file; Douyin popularity ranks 91st overall, rated as 'average'; no signs of application gaps or anomalies, with stable application psychology; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Finance, Business Administration, and Foreign Language and Literature, which are highly attractive to liberal arts candidates.
